inputs.label: Set A size
inputs.businessContext: Number of elements uniquely belonging to set A, including overlaps

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of elements uniquely belonging to set A, including overlaps
businessContext_i18n.tr: A kümesine ait benzersiz eleman sayısı (kesişimler dahil)

inputs.label: Set B size
inputs.businessContext: Number of elements uniquely belonging to set B, including overlaps

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of elements uniquely belonging to set B, including overlaps
businessContext_i18n.tr: B kümesine ait benzersiz eleman sayısı (kesişimler dahil)

inputs.label: Set C size
inputs.businessContext: Number of elements uniquely belonging to set C, including overlaps

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of elements uniquely belonging to set C, including overlaps
businessContext_i18n.tr: C kümesine ait benzersiz eleman sayısı (kesişimler dahil)

inputs.label: A ∩ B size
inputs.businessContext: Number of elements common to sets A and B, possibly also in C

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of elements common to sets A and B, possibly also in C
businessContext_i18n.tr: A ve B kümelerinde ortak olan eleman sayısı (C'de de olabilir)

inputs.label: A ∩ C size
inputs.businessContext: Number of elements common to sets A and C, possibly also in B

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of elements common to sets A and C, possibly also in B
businessContext_i18n.tr: A ve C kümelerinde ortak olan eleman sayısı (B'de de olabilir)

inputs.label: B ∩ C size
inputs.businessContext: Number of elements common to sets B and C, possibly also in A

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of elements common to sets B and C, possibly also in A
businessContext_i18n.tr: B ve C kümelerinde ortak olan eleman sayısı (A'da da olabilir)

inputs.label: A ∩ B ∩ C size
inputs.businessContext: Number of elements common to all three sets A, B, and C

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of elements common to all three sets A, B, and C
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her üç kümede (A, B ve C) ortak olan eleman sayısı

inputs.label: Universal set size
inputs.businessContext: Total number of elements in the entire universe, including those outside A, B, and C

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of elements in the entire universe, including those outside A, B, and C
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm evrendeki toplam eleman sayısı (A, B ve C dışındakiler dahil)

formulas.unionSize: sizeA + sizeB + sizeC - intersectAB - intersectAC - intersectBC + intersectABC
formulas.none: universal - (sizeA + sizeB + sizeC - intersectAB - intersectAC - intersectBC + intersectABC)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
